research_plan:
SUB-QUESTIONS:
1. What is the standard coarse thread pitch for an M6 bolt?
2. What are the Width Across Flats (wrench size) and head height dimensions for a standard M6 hex bolt (ISO 4017 / DIN 933)?
3. What is the recommended clearance hole diameter for an M6 bolt (standard and close fit)?

SEARCH QUERIES:
- "M6 metric bolt dimensions chart ISO 4017 DIN 933"
- "M6x1.0 vs M6x0.75 thread specifications major diameter"
- "Standard M6 hex bolt head width across flats and height"
- "Metric clearance hole sizes for M6 fasteners engineering table"

BEST WEBSITES TO CHECK DIRECTLY:
- https://www.engineeringtoolbox.com/
- https://www.mcmaster.com/
- https://www.boltdepot.com/

DONE WHEN:
- Standard thread pitch (1.0mm) is confirmed.
- Head dimensions (10mm width across flats) are verified against ISO or DIN standards.
- Data is corroborated by 2-3 independent engineering tables or supplier catalogs.
